isi.lyrics_timestamp:
[Intro]
You, ooh
You, ooh

[Verse 1]
Sometimes I feel
Sometimes I don't
Know where to go
When you feel like home
I’ll stay with you, with you
You take the words
Out of my mouth
Know what to say
When I'm feeling down
So, I'll stay, stay, oh, stay

[Pre-Chorus]
I’d spend with you
All of my days
Summer's not over with you
'Cause I feel it

[Chorus]
Ooh, summer's not over with you
'Cause summer's not

[Verse 2]
Eyes like sky
Got me running for miles
Catch a glimpse of you
I might die
Waves in the ocean
Crashing and burning
I'm yours (Yours)
Yours (Yours)
Yours (Ooh)
Know that I'm yours (Yours)
Yours (Yours)
Yeah (Ooh)

[Pre-Chorus]
I’d spend with you
All of my days
Summer’s not over with you
Cause I feel it

[Chorus]
Ooh, summer's not over with you
’Cause summer's not

[Outro]
You take the words
Know what to say
You feel like home
Know that I'll stay (Ooh)
Know that I'll stay
’Causе summer's not over
